semantic.role: GitHub Actions CI workflow definition for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Defines CI pipeline triggered on push and pull requests to main branch
Includes steps for checkout, Node.js setup, dependency installation, linting, building, testing, and package integrity check

English.purpose: This document defines the continuous integration workflow for the ArchSpine repository using GitHub Actions.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for project maintainers and contributors who need to understand or modify the automated CI pipeline. The workflow runs on every push and pull request to the main branch to ensure code quality and build integrity.
key_takeaways: CI runs on push/PR to main branch
Steps: checkout, setup Node 20, install, lint, build, test, pack check
Concurrency group set to cancel redundant runs
Permissions limited to read-only for contents

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 仓库的持续集成工作流，使用 GitHub Actions 实现。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向项目维护者和贡献者，帮助他们理解或修改自动化 CI 管道。该工作流在每次推送到主分支或创建拉取请求时运行，以确保代码质量和构建完整性。
key_takeaways: CI 在推送到主分支或创建 PR 时触发
步骤包括：检出代码、设置 Node 20、安装依赖、代码检查、构建、测试、打包完整性检查
设置并发组以取消冗余运行
权限仅限内容的读取权限
